title: Update preact to version 6.1.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [preact](https://www.npmjs.com/package/preact) just published its new version 6.1.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency preact
New version 6.1.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of preact. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 25 commits . - [`7ade275`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/7ade27579ffce259fa34be58ef48e6bbdd1919b4) 6.1.0 - [`e7c6ab6`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/e7c6ab672a5f18e67dec3cb7e7feabc7f404b337) Move both className to class normalization and hashed class stringification out of `h()` and into the DOM renderer. - [`d38660f`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/d38660f89b25c821de96e6352a077c6682ed81bf) Move a few things around to save 2 bytes. - [`f64d72a`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/f64d72acaccd4da83b57fed186f047b55fce68e5) Found a way to knock 60 bytes off while improving performance of children flattening/normalization in `h()`! - [`67cc02f`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/67cc02f4531ea71e8595c12c92c75c560d6c49f6) Add support for single level of array children in h() (#313) - [`c9a6eb7`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/c9a6eb7d66122f3b0e34ed34a1247fd9962c8e1a) Add typings path to `package.json`. Fixes #318. - [`73e3dfe`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/73e3dfe18823d51014e166c1db299a4677c19b75) Temporarily turn off suspect assertion. - [`0af7881`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/0af78814e5130719402bf0aef345c9a57739a26f) Fix prop cache reset triggering in the wrong case (affected performance) - [`76ba7f4`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/76ba7f4eb764a47e1ae21a266896779797d7ea0b) Upon initial entry into diff, check if the diff should start out in SVG mode. Fixes #331. - [`e0935e3`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/e0935e30f7adfc74333f41be14b00f394efffcfd) Exclusively rely on DOM state when diffing `value` and `checked` props Fixes #326. - [`22b6518`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/22b65182bc95a04dd2b281255094ba29757dc5f7) When removing old props from the DOM, skip those with empty values. - [`c7f8105`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/c7f8105e44b8cbd3d4a5760184bd4ca90da5d6bd) [cruft removal] - [`7f6a5be`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/7f6a5beaf5aff8db6c2c99c23efdfbdcbeb7302c) Fix issue where re-rendering an intermediary high order component could remove (or fail to add) the associated element. - [`ee7c20f`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/ee7c20f4637ee6aafef070fd6f966d74e5f778ef) Merge branch 'master' of github.com:developit/preact - [`2743a80`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/2743a807133b9f96702eb2a722e9f6ea7122fa57) Address ownership issue when rendering using reclaimed DOM. Seems to be a fix for #297. There are 25 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/developit/preact/compare/d26ab44ac21a85650e22cf0dc3d8efc28997a569...7ade27579ffce259fa34be58ef48e6bbdd1919b4). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
